case_title: GOLDSMITH, ESTEVANICO vs. JOHN DOE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDSMITH, ESTEVANICO AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE DOES 2 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-03-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-06-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-14-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-03-1996, CONTINUED TO FEB-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE OR WITHDRAWAL OF COUNSEL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDSMITH, ESTEVANICO HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY, FILED BY ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR HOUGH, MARY PATRICIA AS ATTORNEY FOR GOLDSMITH, ESTEVANICO
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JAN-30-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SEE EXECUTED ORDER.
